---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug, error, or inconsistency in specifications or registries
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'
---

## 📍 Location
- **Document:** 
- **Section:** 

## Severity
- [ ] Editorial (typo, formatting)
- [ ] Minor (minor wording issue, small inconsistency)
- [ ] Major (significant ambiguity, notable error)
- [ ] Critical (breaks implementation, violates core principles)

## Description
Clear description of the bug.

## Current Behavior
What currently happens?

## Expected Behavior
What should happen instead?

## Examples
Specific examples or quotes showing the issue.

## Impact
How does this affect users or implementations?

## 🔗 References
Related issues, ADRs, or specifications.
